top_signals: Israel strikes central Beirut — 10 killed, 10-storey building destroyed. Evacuation orders for 50 villages in South Lebanon + Beqaa Valley
Iran retaliates for Larijani assassination: cluster warheads hit Tel Aviv, 2 killed, IRGC claims 100+ targets struck
Kabul hospital death toll 400+ from Pakistan airstrike. Taliban warns retaliation — all-out war risk
Joe Kent resigns as NCTC director: 'Iran posed no imminent threat.' Gabbard hearing postponed to Thursday
US strikes Iranian anti-ship positions along Strait of Hormuz with bunker buster bombs
Hormuz traffic still severely disrupted (~70% reduction) despite maritime intelligence of partial reopening
Fresh Iranian missile/drone barrages on all Gulf states — all intercepted
900K+ displaced in Lebanon, Israel intensifies operations with no ceasefire in sight
Zelensky in UK, Starmer warns Putin must not benefit from Iran war. Ukraine peace frozen
Iran FM warns war 'global repercussions will hit all'

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 22): ZERO de-escalation signals in active war theaters. Iran escalates with cluster warheads. US escalates with bunker busters. Pakistan kills 408 in Kabul. Israel expands Lebanon ops. Putin-Trump call TODAY is wildcard — Ukraine focus, not ME de-escalation. Senate Intel hearing TODAY — narrative inflection, not battlefield inflection.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes central Beirut — 10 killed, 10-storey building destroyed in Bashoura
latest_news.text: Israeli airstrike levels 10-storey building in central Beirut (Bashoura). 10 killed, 24 wounded. Evacuation orders issued for 50 villages across southern Lebanon and Beqaa Valley. Hezbollah fires rockets at northern Israel.

latest_news.headline: Iran retaliates for Larijani killing — cluster warheads hit Tel Aviv, 2 killed
latest_news.text: IRGC claims missiles hit 100+ Israeli targets. 2 killed near Tel Aviv. Army chief Hatami vows 'decisive and regrettable' retaliation. Fresh barrages across Gulf — all 4 states intercept.

latest_news.headline: Kabul hospital death toll reaches 400 — Taliban warns retaliation
latest_news.text: Pakistan airstrike on Kabul drug treatment hospital death toll updated to 400. Third strike on Afghan capital. Taliban warns retaliation — could trigger all-out war between the two nuclear-armed neighbors.

latest_news.headline: Joe Kent resigns as NCTC director — 'Iran posed no imminent threat'
latest_news.source: Washington Post / Politico / NBC / CNN / DW
latest_news.text: First Trump official to quit over Iran war. Cited Israeli 'misinformation' and lies about 'swift path to victory.' Gabbard hearing postponed to Thursday. Political earthquake in Washington.

latest_news.headline: Zelensky visits UK — Starmer warns Putin must not benefit from Iran war
latest_news.text: Zelensky addresses UK Parliament. Starmer says Russia must not reap rewards of higher oil prices or easing sanctions due to Middle East instability. Peace process frozen as Trump focused on Iran.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 23, 10:25 UTC) — War Day 23. ESCALATION ACROSS ALL FRONTS: (1) Israel destroys 10-storey building in central Beirut, 10 killed — deepest strike yet into Beirut; (2) Iran retaliates for Larijani with cluster warheads on Tel Aviv; (3) Kabul hospital death toll 400, Taliban threatens all-out war; (4) Kent resignation becomes political earthquake, first admin official to quit; (5) US bunker bombs Hormuz sites. Hormuz remains ~70% disrupted. Oil elevated. ZERO ceasefire signals in any active theater.
